blended.narrative: Loon Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 9,250 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 54°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Friday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
